issues.description: Condition should be 'LeaderHasType' (checking Leader type), not 'HasCardOnBoard' (which checks board state). Text says 'your Leader's type includes "Roger Pirates"'.
Missing second condition: 'HasAttachedDon' to verify 'you have any DON!! cards given'.
SearchDeck action missing 'Rest' action after adding DON!! card. Text says 'add up to 1 DON!! card from your DON!! deck and rest it'.
Filter should specify DON!! card type, not 'Any'. Should be more restrictive.
